meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Scale SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Break free from basic app limitations. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to deliver professional, high-impact SaaS solutions faster.
content.answer_block: Stop building basic CRUD apps that fail to scale. By integrating the Antigravity template with Claude Code, you gain a production-ready architecture immediately. This workflow automates boilerplate, enforces enterprise-grade security, and allows you to focus on high-value business logic while slashing your development time by over 60%.
content.intro:
The screen flickers with the same repetitive boilerplate you’ve written a hundred times. You’re trapped in a cycle of basic apps, missing deadlines while juggling technical debt, and watching your profit margins shrink as clients demand more for less. The industry is moving faster than your current workflow allows, and 'just coding harder' isn't the answer.

It’s time to abandon the manual labor. The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural skeleton, providing a battle-tested foundation that handles the heavy lifting before you even type your first line of custom logic. Paired with the raw intelligence of Claude Code, you aren't just writing code—you are orchestrating high-performance software at lightning speed.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Boilerplate
steps.description: Establish the root architecture. This step ensures your project has the correct folder structure, dependency management, and environment configurations ready for production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity core template with Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Configure Auth and Security layers
steps.description: Secure your application by default. Antigravity handles the complex RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) logic so you don't have to build it from scratch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement secure authentication middleware for protected API routes and user-specific data isolation.

steps.title: Automate Feature Logic Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your client's business requirements directly to the Antigravity architecture, bypassing manual coding of standard API endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a REST API endpoint and corresponding database migration for a subscription management feature.

steps.title: Inject UI Components
steps.description: Standardize your client's look and feel by pulling from the pre-built Antigravity component library, ensuring consistency and responsiveness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a responsive dashboard layout component with sidebar navigation and data charts.

steps.title: Run Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Validate your build before deployment. Claude Code runs the Antigravity test suite to ensure no regressions were introduced during development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase for potential security vulnerabilities and run the full unit test suite.

pro_tips: Use Claude Code's 'commit' flag to automatically generate semantic commit messages based on your Antigravity changes.
Always run your database migrations through the Antigravity CLI to ensure schema synchronization across dev and staging.
Keep your 'antigravity.config.js' file updated to lock in your preferred library versions for every new client project.
Use the 'claude --stream' flag for real-time visibility into how the AI is modifying your project's internal directory structure.
Treat the Antigravity template as a living document; commit your custom reusable components back to a private fork to build your own proprietary library.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, focus on creating custom 'blueprints' within Antigravity that encapsulate your specific niche expertise, allowing you to deploy entire SaaS solutions in under an hour.
content.conversion_block: Don't settle for basic. Scale your freelance business, deliver enterprise quality, and reclaim your time by mastering the AI-driven stack. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
